chapters.title: Welcome to the Dojo: Linux Fundamentals
chapters.description: Discover why Linux is the hacker's operating system of choice. Set up your mental environment and learn what the 'shell' really is.

chapters.title: Pathfinder: Navigating the Filesystem
chapters.description: Master the `cd`, `ls`, and `pwd` commands. You will never get lost in the terminal forest again.

chapters.title: Digital Carpentry: File Manipulation
chapters.description: Create, destroy, copy, and move files like a ghost in the machine. Learn `touch`, `rm`, `cp`, and `mv`.

chapters.title: Reading the Matrix: Viewing & Filtering Text
chapters.description: Stop opening heavy text editors. Master `cat`, `head`, `tail`, and the mighty `grep` to find needles in haystacks.

chapters.title: Gatekeepers: Users, Groups & Permissions
chapters.description: The difference between a script kiddie and a hacker is knowing who has access. Master `chmod`, `chown`, and `sudo`.

chapters.title: Process Domination: ps, top & kill
chapters.description: Learn to see the invisible programs running in memory and how to terminate rogue processes with extreme prejudice.

chapters.title: Networking 101: The Web of Deceit
chapters.description: How does data leave your box? Understand IP addresses, ports, and the essential `netstat` and `ping` tools.

chapters.title: The Forge: Introduction to Bash Scripting
chapters.description: Stop typing. Start automating. Learn variables, conditionals, and loops to build your first reconnaissance script.

chapters.title: Stealth & Services: Managing Software
chapters.description: Using `apt` to install hacking tools and `systemctl` to control background services like SSH and Apache.

chapters.title: The Art of Redirection: stdin, stdout, stderr
chapters.description: Master pipes (`|`) and redirects (`>`, `>>`). Chain simple commands together to form complex digital weapons.

chapters.title: Cron Jobs: Automation & Persistence
chapters.description: Schedule tasks to run at specific times. Essential for maintaining access and automating backups.

chapters.title: Logging & The OPSEC Mindset
chapters.description: You can't be a ghost if you leave footprints. Learn how to find and clear logs, and understand the forensic impact of your commands.
